DeleteCollection(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.DeleteOptions, listOpts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) error; Get(ctx context.Context, name string, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.GetOptions) (*k8s.io/api/extensions/v1beta1.Deployment, error); GetScale(ctx context.Context, deploymentName string, options k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.GetOptions) (*k8s.io/api/extensions/v1beta1.Scale, error); List(ctx context.Context, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.ListOptions) (*k8s.io/api/extensions/v1beta1.DeploymentList, error); Patch(ctx context.Context, name string, pt k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types.PatchType, data []byte, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.PatchOptions, subresources ...string) (result *k8s.io/api/extensions/v1beta1.Deployment, err error); Update(ctx context.Context, deployment *k8s.io/api/extensions/v1beta1.Deployment, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.UpdateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/extensions/v1beta1.Deployment, error); UpdateScale(ctx context.Context, deploymentName string, scale *k8s.io/api/extensions/v1beta1.Scale, opts k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1.UpdateOptions) (*k8s.io/api/extensions/v1beta1.Scale, error);
